---
title: "Model"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(spmodel)

```

## Data

```{r}

dat <- vroom::vroom("PotatoCWSI.csv") %>% filter(!is.na(CWSI))

```

## EDA

```{r}

library(viridis)

# us_states <- map_data("state")
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = dat, aes(x = POINT_X, y = POINT_Y, color = CWSI))+
  scale_color_viridis()
```

make centers

```{r}

K <- 35
obs_loc_mat <- dat[,c("POINT_X", "POINT_Y")]

centers <- fields::cover.design(obs_loc_mat, nd = K)$design

```

```{r}

dist_btwn_centers <- fields::rdist(centers)

the_scale <- 1.5*max(apply(dist_btwn_centers, 1, function(x){sort(x)}[2]))
```

```{r}

library(FRK)
spat_features <- local_basis(
  manifold = plane(),
  loc = centers,
  scale = rep(the_scale,K),
  type = "bisquare"
) %>%
  eval_basis(as.matrix(obs_loc_mat)) %>%
  as.matrix()

colnames(spat_features) <- paste0("SF", 1:K)
```

```{r}

spatial_dataframe <- bind_cols(dat, spat_features)
```

```{r}
library(viridis)
library(patchwork)

gg1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = dat, aes(x = POINT_X, y = POINT_Y, color = CWSI))+
  scale_color_viridis()+
  geom_point(
    data = data.frame(POINT_X = centers[,1], POINT_Y = centers[,2]),
    aes(x = POINT_X, y = POINT_Y),
    color = "red",
    size = 2
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


gg1

```

```{r}

# spat_lm <- lm(CWSI ~ . -POINT_X - POINT_Y, data = spatial_dataframe)
# #summary(spat_lm)
# 
# spat_inter <- lm(CWSI ~ . -POINT_X - POINT_Y + TWI:ECA_SHALLOW + ASPECT:SLOPE, data = spatial_dataframe)
# #summary(spat_inter)
# anova(spat_lm, spat_inter)

```

```{r}

#spat_lm


# spatial_dataframe$resids <- residuals(spat_inter)
# 
# plot(spmodel::esv(resids ~ 1, data = spatial_dataframe, xcoord = POINT_X, ycoord = POINT_Y))
```

```{r}
library(spmodel)
sp_lm <- splm(CWSI ~ SF1+SF2+SF3+SF4+SF5+SF6+SF7+SF8+SF9+SF10+SF11+SF12+SF13+SF14+SF15+SF16+SF17+SF18+SF19+SF20+SF21+SF22+SF23+SF24+SF25+SF26+SF27+SF28+SF29+SF30+SF31+SF32+SF33+SF34+SF35+SLOPE+TWI+ASPECT+ECA_SHALLOW+NDVI+TWI:ECA_SHALLOW + ASPECT:SLOPE,
              data = spatial_dataframe,
              spcov_type = 'exponential',
              xcoord = 'POINT_X', ycoord = 'POINT_Y')
```

```{r}


rmse <- sqrt(mean((sp_lm$fitted$response-spatial_dataframe$CWSI)^2))
rmse

```

```{r}
# library(spmodel)
# 
# set.seed(123)
# 
# k <- 10
# n <- nrow(spatial_dataframe)
# fold_id <- sample(rep(1:k, length.out = n))
# 
# rmse_fold <- numeric(k)
# 
# for (i in 1:k) {
#   train_data <- spatial_dataframe[fold_id != i, ]
#   test_data  <- spatial_dataframe[fold_id == i, ]
#   
#   sp_lm_k <- splm(
#     CWSI ~ SF1+SF2+SF3+SF4+SF5+SF6+SF7+SF8+SF9+SF10+
#       SF11+SF12+SF13+SF14+SF15+SF16+SF17+SF18+SF19+SF20+
#       SF21+SF22+SF23+SF24+SF25+SF26+SF27+SF28+SF29+SF30+
#       SF31+SF32+SF33+SF34+SF35+
#       SLOPE+TWI+ASPECT+ECA_SHALLOW+NDVI+
#       TWI:ECA_SHALLOW + ASPECT:SLOPE,
#     data = train_data,
#     spcov_type = "exponential",
#     xcoord = "POINT_X",
#     ycoord = "POINT_Y"
#   )
#   
#   preds <- predict(sp_lm_k, newdata = test_data)
#   
#   rmse_fold[i] <- sqrt(mean((preds - test_data$CWSI)^2))
# }
# 
# rmse_cv <- mean(rmse_fold)
# rmse_cv
```

## Make df for all data

```{r}

all_dat <- vroom::vroom("PotatoCWSI.csv")

all_obs_loc_mat <- all_dat[,c("POINT_X", "POINT_Y")]

all_spat_features <- local_basis(
  manifold = plane(),
  loc = centers,
  scale = rep(the_scale,K),
  type = "bisquare"
) %>%
  eval_basis(as.matrix(all_obs_loc_mat)) %>%
  as.matrix()

colnames(all_spat_features) <- paste0("SF", 1:K)

full_dataframe <- bind_cols(all_dat, all_spat_features)
```

```{r}

#save(rmse_fold, file="k_fold_results")

save(full_dataframe, sp_lm, file = "CorbinBMatthewW.Rdata")
load("CorbinBMatthewW.Rdata")
```
